english: The universe is like a city seen reflected in a mirror, contained within oneself
roman: Vishvam darpana drishyamana nagari tulyam nijantargatam

english: Seeing through Maya as if risen externally, as in a dream
roman: Pashyann atmani mayaya bahiri vodbhutam yatha nidhraya

english: He who at the time of awakening directly realises the non-dual self alone
roman: Yah sakshatkurute prabodha samaye sva atmanam eva advayam

english: To that Guru-form, Sri Dakshinamurthy — this salutation
roman: Tasmai Shri Gurumurtaye namaidam Shri Dakshinamurtaye

english: As a sprout lies within a seed, this universe lies undifferentiated before manifestation
roman: Bijasya antariva ankuro jagadidam prangnirvikalpam punah

english: Depicted in the wonderful variety of space-time divisions created by Maya
roman: Maya kalpita desha kala kalanavaichi trya chitriki ritam

english: Like a magician, like a great yogi, who unfolds the world by his own will
roman: Mayaviva vijrimbhayatyapi maha yogiva yah svechhaya

english: To that Guru-form, Sri Dakshinamurthy — this salutation
roman: Tasmai Shri Gurumurtaye namaidam Shri Dakshinamurtaye

english: Because the nature of being the Self of all is clearly shown in this hymn
roman: Sarvatmatvam iti sphutikritam idam yasmat amumin stave

english: By hearing it, reflecting on its meaning, meditating and singing it
roman: Tenasya shravanaat tad artha mananad dhyanachcha sankirtanat

english: One naturally attains the Godhood endowed with the great glory of being the Self of all
roman: Sarvatmatva maha vibhuti sahitam syad Ishvaratvam svatah

english: And the eightfold lordship becomes unobstructed perfection
roman: Siddhi yet tat punar ashtadha parinratam chaishvaryam avyahatam
